# DATPAQ IP Geolocation API Sample

This repository contains a production-ready single-page application demonstrating the DATPAQ IP Geolocation API.

## Primary resources
- Human docs: https://datpaq.com/api/v1/ip-geolocation
- API base URL: https://datpaq.com/api
- API route used by this sample: /v1/ip-geolocation
- OpenAI metadata (machine-readable): /openai.json

## What this app demonstrates
- Single-IP geolocation lookup via JSON body payload.
- Required request validation for API key and IP address.
- Loading, error, empty, and success state rendering.
- Copyable request URL and JSON response output.

## Auth expectations
- Requires an API key in the `x-api-key` request header.

## Request contract (POST /v1/ip-geolocation)
- Required: `ip`

## Output contract
- Typical successful response includes:
  - `ip`
  - `location.country`
  - `location.region`
  - `location.city`
  - `location.latitude`
  - `location.longitude`
  - `network.network`
  - `network.asn`
  - `network.org`
